name_en: Stone lantern of the Koai Fudo Hall, one lantern
description_en: A stone lantern of the Koai Fudo Hall, one lantern. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Mizumoto, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Laborers' banner
description_en: A banner (nobori) associated with laborers. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is kept at the Museum of Local History and Astronomy, Shiratori 3-25-1, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Square-pillar road marker with the three monkeys carved in relief
description_en: A square-pillar road marker bearing the three monkeys carved in relief. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Takasago, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Boat-shaped Jizo road marker
description_en: A road marker in the form of a boat-shaped Jizo statue. It is a tangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Kanamachi, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Sacred lion dance of Shibamata Hachiman Shrine
description_en: The sacred lion dance (kamijishi) of Shibamata Hachiman Shrine. It is an intangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is transmitted in Shibamata, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Fuji pilgrimage confraternity of Iizuka
description_en: The Fuji pilgrimage confraternity (Fujiko) of Iizuka. It is an intangible folk cultural property designated by Katsushika Ward. It is transmitted in Minami-Mizumoto, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Shibamata Hachiman Jinja no Kofun Sekishitsu
name_en: Stone burial chamber of the kofun at Shibamata Hachiman Shrine
description_en: The stone burial chamber of the burial mound (kofun) at Shibamata Hachiman Shrine. It is a historic site designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Shibamata, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Grave of the haiku poet Suzuki Shoju
description_en: The grave of the haiku poet Suzuki Shoju. It is a historic site designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Kanamachi, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Site of the Kosuge coin mint
description_en: The site of the Kosuge coin mint (zeniza). It is a historic site designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Kosuge, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Onizuka mound
description_en: The mound known as Onizuka. It is a historic site designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Okudo, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Horikiri Iris Garden
description_en: The Horikiri Iris Garden (Horikiri Shobuen). It is a place of scenic beauty designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Horikiri, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Rakanmaki tree of Konrenin Temple, one tree
description_en: A rakanmaki (Podocarpus) tree at Konrenin Temple, one tree. It is a natural monument designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Kanamachi, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Camphor tree of the Yoshida family, one tree
description_en: A camphor tree (kusunoki) of the Yoshida family, one tree. It is a natural monument designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Horikiri, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Ginkgo tree of Takagi Shrine, one tree
description_en: A ginkgo tree at Takagi Shrine, one tree. It is a natural monument designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Nishi-Kameari, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Higashi-Mizumoto Kumano Jinja no Tabunoki Futakabu
name_en: Machilus trees of Higashi-Mizumoto Kumano Shrine, two trees
description_en: Two machilus (tabunoki) trees at Kumano Shrine in Higashi-Mizumoto. It is a natural monument designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Mizumoto, Katsushika Ward.

name_en: Ginkgo trees of Kasai Shrine, three trees
description_en: Three ginkgo trees at Kasai Shrine. It is a natural monument designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Higashi-Kanamachi, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Niijuku Hie Jinja no Ichō Hitokabu
name_en: Ginkgo tree of Niijuku Hie Shrine, one tree
description_en: A ginkgo tree at Hie Shrine in Niijuku, one tree. It is a natural monument designated by Katsushika Ward. It is located in Niijuku, Katsushika Ward.

name_romaji: Shinagawa Jinja Sekizō Torii narabini Suiban
name_en: Stone torii gate and water basin of Shinagawa Shrine
description_en: The stone torii gate and water basin of Shinagawa Shrine. It is a tangible cultural property (structure) designated by Shinagawa Ward on November 22, 1978. It is located at Kita-Shinagawa 3-7-15, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Stone lanterns of Shinagawa Shrine
description_en: The stone lanterns of Shinagawa Shrine. It is a tangible cultural property (structure) designated by Shinagawa Ward on November 22, 1978. It is located at Kita-Shinagawa 3-7-15, Shinagawa Ward.

name_romaji: Shihon Chakushoku Shakuson Tanjō Hensō-zu Ippuku
name_en: Color-on-paper painting of the birth of Shakyamuni, one hanging scroll
description_en: A color-on-paper narrative painting of the birth of Shakyamuni Buddha, one hanging scroll. It is a tangible cultural property (painting) designated by Shinagawa Ward on February 12, 1981. It is located at Kita-Shinagawa 2-2-14, Shinagawa Ward.

name_romaji: Shihon Bokuga Tansai Royō Daruma-zu Ippuku
name_en: Ink and light color on paper painting of Daruma on a reed leaf, one hanging scroll
description_en: An ink and light color on paper painting of Daruma crossing on a reed leaf, one hanging scroll. It is a tangible cultural property (painting) designated by Shinagawa Ward on March 14, 1985. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 4-2-16, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Color-on-silk paintings of arhats (dragon and tiger arhats), pair of hanging scrolls
description_en: Color-on-silk paintings of arhats, known as the dragon and tiger arhat paintings, a pair of hanging scrolls. It is a tangible cultural property (painting) designated by Shinagawa Ward on March 14, 1985. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 4-2-16, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Ink-on-paper painting of Monju riding a lion, one hanging scroll
description_en: An ink-on-paper painting of Monju Bodhisattva riding a lion, one hanging scroll. It is a tangible cultural property (painting) designated by Shinagawa Ward on March 14, 1985. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 4-2-16, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Seated statue of Amida Nyorai, one figure
description_en: A seated statue of Amida Nyorai (Amitabha Buddha), one figure. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward on February 12, 1981. It is located at Kita-Shinagawa 2-2-14, Shinagawa Ward.

name_romaji: Hōnen Shōnin Zazō Tsuketari Enkō Daishi Goshinsaku Tsukinowa no Miei Ryaku Engi Ikku
name_en: Seated statue of Honen Shonin, with the abbreviated origin account of the Tsukinowa portrait made by Enko Daishi, one figure
description_en: A seated statue of the priest Honen Shonin (one figure), accompanied by an abbreviated origin account of the Tsukinowa portrait attributed to Enko Daishi. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward on February 12, 1981. It is located at Kita-Shinagawa 2-2-14, Shinagawa Ward.

name_romaji: Mokuzō Shaka Nyorai oyobi Ryōkyōji Zō Sanku
name_en: Wooden statues of Shaka Nyorai and two flanking attendants, three figures
description_en: Wooden statues of Shaka Nyorai (Shakyamuni Buddha) with two flanking attendants, three figures. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward on February 16, 1984. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 4-2-16, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Seated statue of a monastery guardian deity, one figure
description_en: A statue of a monastery guardian deity (garanjin) in seated posture on a chair, one figure. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward on February 16, 1984. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 4-2-16, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Bronze standing statue of Amida Nyorai, one figure
description_en: A bronze standing statue of Amida Nyorai (Amitabha Buddha), one figure. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward. It is located at Kita-Shinagawa 2-3-12, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Wooden statues of the Fudo triad, three figures
description_en: Wooden statues of the Fudo Myoo triad, three figures. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward. It is located at Kita-Shinagawa 2-3-12, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Wooden standing statue of Amida Nyorai
description_en: A wooden standing statue of Amida Nyorai (Amitabha Buddha). It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward on March 10, 1992. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 2-9-5, Shinagawa Ward.

name_romaji: Mokuzō Nichiren Shōnin Zazō Tsuketari Zōnai Nōnyū Zōzō Ganmon Zōnai Nōnyū Hokekyō
name_en: Wooden seated statue of Nichiren Shonin, with the dedicatory prayer and Lotus Sutra deposited inside the statue
description_en: A wooden seated statue of the priest Nichiren Shonin, accompanied by the dedicatory prayer text and a copy of the Lotus Sutra deposited inside the statue. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward on April 25, 2006. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 4-2-8, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Wooden seated statue in bodhisattva form
description_en: A wooden seated statue in bodhisattva form. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward on March 28, 2019. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 4-4-2, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Temple bell of Tokaiji Temple, one bell
description_en: The temple bell of Tokaiji Temple, one bell. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward on November 22, 1978. It is located at Kita-Shinagawa 3-11-9, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Plaster relief pictures of the deeds of Ame-no-Uzume-no-Mikoto, two panels
description_en: Plaster relief pictures (kote-e) depicting the deeds of the deity Ame-no-Uzume-no-Mikoto, two panels. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward on February 10, 1982. It is located at Higashi-Shinagawa 1-35-8, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Portable shrine, one shrine
description_en: A portable shrine (mikoshi), one shrine. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward. It is located at Kita-Shinagawa 3-7-15, Shinagawa Ward.

name_romaji: Kin Akairo Kise Sakura-mon Garasu Kabin Ippin
name_en: Gold-red overlay glass vase with cherry blossom design, one vase
description_en: A glass vase with gold-red overlay and a cherry blossom design, one vase. It is a tangible cultural property (craft object) designated by Shinagawa Ward on March 3, 2000. It is kept at the Shinagawa Historical Museum, Oi 6-11-1, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Mandala written by Nichiju, one hanging scroll
description_en: A calligraphic mandala written by the priest Nichiju, one hanging scroll. It is a tangible cultural property (calligraphy and classical books) designated by Shinagawa Ward on March 12, 1983. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 2-8-23, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Letter of Nichiren (Reply to the Wife of Ueno), one hanging scroll
description_en: A letter of the priest Nichiren, known as the Reply to the Wife of Ueno, one hanging scroll. It is a tangible cultural property (calligraphy and classical books) designated by Shinagawa Ward on March 12, 1983. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 2-8-23, Shinagawa Ward.

name_romaji: Nichijū Fujumon oyobi Okibumi Utsushi Ikkan
name_en: Copy of Nichiju's recitation text and testamentary instructions, one scroll
description_en: A copy of the recitation text and testamentary instructions of the priest Nichiju, one scroll. It is a tangible cultural property (calligraphy and classical books) designated by Shinagawa Ward on March 12, 1983. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 2-8-23, Shinagawa Ward.

name_en: Classical books of Myorenji Temple
description_en: The classical books of Myorenji Temple. It is a tangible cultural property (classical books) designated by Shinagawa Ward on March 10, 1992. It is located at Minami-Shinagawa 1-1-1, Shinagawa Ward.
